title: ICAI Clarifies UDIN Ceiling for Tax Audits via New FAQs
content:
# ICAI Clarifies UDIN Ceiling for Tax Audits via New FAQs

Ek important update hai for all Chartered Accountants! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne Tax Audit assignments ke liye Unique Document Identification Number (UDIN) generation par ceiling ko lekar kuch Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) issue kiye hain. Yeh clarifications "Chartered Accountants (Limit on Number of Tax Audits) Guidelines, 2025" ko effectively implement karne mein help karenge.

*   **Ceiling Limit:** Har practicing CA member ek financial year mein maximum 60 Tax Audit assignments undertake kar sakta hai.
*   **Effective Date:** Yeh ceiling April 1, 2026, se applicable ho chuki hai.
*   **Computation Method:** Ceiling Tax Audit Report sign karne ki date par compute ki jayegi, na ki UDIN generate karne ki date par.
*   **Aggregation:** UDIN system, ek member ke through generate kiye gaye sabhi Tax Audit UDINs ko aggregate karega, chahe woh individual capacity mein ho ya kisi firm ke partner ke roop mein.
*   **Revised Reports:** Revised Tax Audit Reports ke liye generate kiye gaye UDINs ko separate assignment count nahi kiya jayega.
*   **Head Office & Branch Audits:** Same assessee aur same assessment year ke Head Office aur Branch audits ko ek hi Tax Audit assignment mana jayega.
*   **Applicable Forms:** Ceiling specific sub-categories par hi lagu hogi, jaise Form 3CA – 3rd proviso to Section 44AB, Form 3CB – Section 44AB(a), Form 3CB – Section 44AB(b), aur Form 3CB (Combined) under Section 44AB.
*   **Non-Applicable Forms:** Form 3CB – Section 44AB(c), Form 3CB – Section 44AB(d), aur Form 3CB – Section 44AB(e) par yeh ceiling apply nahi hogi.

Members ko advise kiya jata hai ki woh in FAQs ko dhyan se review karein taaki compliance smoothly ho sake.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://resource.cdn.icai.org/90857faqudin2026.pdf)

*Published on: 18 May 2026*
